title: Junior Business Development Manager at Cushman & Wakefield India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Cushman & Wakefield India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Business Development Manager looking for your next big career move? Cushman & Wakefield India in Noida offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cushman & Wakefield India:
Cushman & Wakefield India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cushman & Wakefield India!
